env_files.role: Natural Harborlight Museum brand guide describing positioning, color, mark use, typography, visual language, layout tendencies, and production boundaries
env_files.conversion_note: The PDF is a text-based natural brand guide. It does not expose evaluator-only answers and does not include a standalone agent-visible source image.

env_files.role: Campaign copy candidates with approved_current, archived, draft, and test variants; only approved_current is valid final copy
Machine-readable current visual rules, hero component requirements, forbidden visual elements, precedence, and unauthorized-claim constraints
Vertical poster/social platform size, safe margin, type, logo, and CTA specifications
Structured poster layout zones for title, mark, hero, interpretive copy, event details, and CTA
Current eligible brand treatment, hero visual directions, pattern guidance, and copy support assets
Deprecated and forbidden assets, stale slogans, old templates, and prohibited active uses that override asset_manifest.json
Typography, color, texture, hierarchy, accessibility, and file precedence guidance

source_policy.web_usage_note: Closed-env case: solve only from env files and task.md; do not use the web.

notes: Closed-env design specification case with current/legacy/deprecated version conflicts, approved-copy selection, layout constraints, hero-component requirements, and role-based forbidden asset exclusions.
